case.title: METROPOLITAN-COLUMBIA STOCKHOLDERS v. CITY OF NEW YORK

opinion.h1: METROPOLITAN-COLUMBIA STOCKHOLDERS v. CITY OF NEW YORK, 320 U.S. 215 (1943)
opinion.h2: METROPOLITAN-COLUMBIA STOCKHOLDERS, Inc., et al., petitioners, v. The CITY OF NEW YORK. No. 824.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Archibald N. Jordan, of New York City (Mr. Glen N. W. McNaughton, of New York City, of counsel), for petitioners.
Mr. Justice ROBERTS and Mr. Justice DOUGLAS took no part in the consideration or decision of this application.[ Metropolitan-Columbia Stockholders v. City of New York 320 U.S. 215 (1943) ]
